_status:
DRAFT — decoy revision per PROPOSAL_player_driven_argument.md §1 (Whimsy subsection) + §3, post 2026-05-16 revision (commit 30680b7). Companion to the live whimsy.json at HEAD. NOT loaded by dialogue_runner — lives in data/dialogues/_drafts/ subdirectory which the runner skips.

Reshape: Whimsy surfaces evidence for frames 3 / 4 (civic-archive property-transfer record AND the rights memo). He does NOT surface notice-period or substantive-defense evidence — those live with Murrow and Halina respectively.

Whimsy's civic-archive hobby is the in-fiction justification for property_transfer_2018 surfacing here. The voice-pack rewrite at HEAD already has Whimsy positioned as a rhetorical-associate-by-temperament; the decoy revision adds the records-hobbyist angle that produces the standing-evidence pointer. The new line about 'a folder of who-owns-what' is one of two voice-pack additions in this draft.

on_dismiss now sets surfaced_property_transfer alongside the existing met_whimsy + recruited_whimsy.
_voice_authority: narrative_revision/voice_agents/whimsy.md + ai_voice_constraints.md. Existing voice-pack discipline preserved; one line added per voice agent (the 'folder of who-owns-what' civic-records line).
_new_flags_referenced: on_dismiss writes chapter1.surfaced_property_transfer. NOT yet declared in state.gd; reference-via-missing-key safe.

states._comment:
DECOY REWRITE. The HEAD version is the procedural-throat single-path recruitment with Cula opening with the conclusion. The decoy revision keeps Whimsy's three-posture response variants (whimsy_co_counsel_posture enum from the overnight cohort) AND adds Whimsy's civic-records surface — he produces the property-transfer record offhand during recruitment, regardless of which posture Cula picks. This is the in-fiction surfacing of property_transfer_2018 evidence.

Whimsy's voice in this state: existing recruitment shape with one new beat. The 'folder of who-owns-what' line is new — voiced per the bible's brilliant-when-aimed + occasionally-near-correct registers. Em-dash latitude permitted.

The three Cula option-texts and Whimsy's three response variants stay (they live in companion states whimsy_response_<posture>); this state authors only the opening and the universal civic-records beat. on_dismiss writes met_whimsy + recruited_whimsy + surfaced_property_transfer.

lines.speaker: cula
lines.text: Mr. Whimsy. Cula, Pig & Swine. We need a second voice in court tomorrow.

lines: Dr. A. Cula. Sit. Have you anything beyond procedural vibes, or am I to be recruited on atmosphere?

choices.text: Notice went to the wrong door — landlord knew. I need the fair-hearing rebuttal in your voice.
He cannot evict her — she has held that flat since eighty-seven. Argue the tenancy.
Tell me the geometry of the wrong. I'll know it when I hear it.

states._comment:
NEW STATE — fires once Cula has picked a posture in before_meeting. Whimsy produces the property-transfer record from his civic-records hobby. This is the universal beat (fires regardless of posture) before the per-posture response state.

on_dismiss sets surfaced_property_transfer (the evidence card becomes surfaceable). DOES NOT set met_whimsy or recruited_whimsy yet — those fire in the per-posture response state that runs next via chain.
lines: Before the music — a fact you may want. I keep a folder of who-owns-what. Marginal pastime. Occasionally useful.

Your landlord sold the building in two thousand and eighteen. The new owner is a property concern out of Mokotów. The eviction notice arrives under the prior owner's hand. The lease will have assigned forward at transfer — the new owner inherits the obligation — but some sharp counsel would raise the standing question anyway.
Not the music I would lead with. The folder is yours if you want it.

states._comment: REWRITE — well-fitted posture response. The HEAD version has this voice; the decoy revision preserves it. The 'fair-hearing argument can sing' calibration anchor stays verbatim.
lines: Ah. The fair-hearing doctrine, asked to do its gymnastics again. Notice to an address without a client; an objection present in paper, absent from the record. I have heard worse music.
Marginalia in espresso. Half the argument is already mine.
I propose. The fair-hearing argument can sing. The service defect gives it a throat. I will lend my voice tomorrow at fourteen hundred.

states._comment: REWRITE — wrong-shape posture response (merits-pivot). Whimsy walks Cula back without rebuke; recruits anyway. Existing draft voice preserved.
lines: The merits — at the motion stage. You wish to argue, before the same court that has already heard the landlord uncontested, that the tenancy is valid.

lines.speaker: cula
lines.text: She has held it since eighty-seven.

lines: She has. And the court will hear that when it hears the case. The motion stage is a door, not a hearing. We are arguing that the door was closed wrongly.
I will follow you in. I am cheaper than the door.

states._comment: REWRITE — open-register posture response. Whimsy probes; recruits without a frame yet committed. Existing draft voice preserved.
lines: The geometry. You walk in with a question rather than a verdict.

lines.speaker: cula
lines.text: I walked in with a binder and three pages of fact.

lines: And no shape yet. Acceptable. The shape will arrive when Crab finishes counting his envelopes.
I propose this. You return with a frame. I lend my voice to whatever frame you bring. The voice is the easy part.
Cula. We have procedure and rhetoric. What we do not yet have is a client in the room. That tends to be useful.
Cula. We are not asking the court for miracles. Merely a doorway through which the client may be heard.
Cula. Somewhere nearby, a right is being reduced to administration. Let us be irritating about it.
Cula! Behold — a black-robed liquid of justice.
Cula. A tragic brew, but tragedy has rights.
Dr. A. Cula! Behold — a black-robed liquid of justice.
Dr. A. Cula. A tragic brew, but tragedy has rights.

idle_flavor: A procedural argument without a metaphor is like coffee without water. Dry and slightly offensive.
